Features Pricing About Contact

Your Files, Everywhere You Need Them

CloudSync keeps your documents, photos, and projects in perfect sync across all your devices. Fast, secure, and effortless.

Why Choose CloudSync?

Everything you need for seamless file management.

⚡

Lightning Fast

Upload and download at blazing speeds with our global CDN network spanning 40+ regions.

🔒

Bank-Grade Security

End-to-end encryption ensures your files stay private. Zero-knowledge architecture means only you can access your data.

🔁

Real-Time Sync

Changes propagate instantly across all connected devices. Never worry about version conflicts again.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

Starter
$0
Free forever
  • 5 GB storage
  • 2 devices
  • Basic support
Pro
$12
per month
  • 1 TB storage
  • Unlimited devices
  • Priority support
  • Version history
Enterprise
$49
per user/month
  • Unlimited storage
  • Unlimited devices
  • 24/7 support
  • Admin console
  • SSO & SAML
CloudSync

Making file management simple and secure for teams of all sizes since 2020.
